title: Classified Ads: The power of being sought after
description: BUSINESS NEWS - In the fast-paced world of...
bodyText:
BUSINESS NEWS - In the fast-paced world of advertising, where brands fight for attention and digital ads flood every screen, there’s one form of advertising that stands out—because people actually look for it.


> Classified ads remain the only type of advertising that is actively sought after by consumers across the globe.


Whether someone is searching for a job, a new home, a second-hand car, or even a missing pet, they turn to the classified section first.

By placing a classified ad, you tap into a powerful audience—buyers who are already in the market, ready to take action.

Group Editors has the reach of both print and online platforms, so your message doesn’t just sit and wait to be seen; it reaches potential customers wherever they are.

From our 5 print newspapers to our 6 websites, our classified ads ensure full market coverage, giving you the best chance of connecting with the right audience at the right time.


> We are pleased to announce that Classifieds now features an e-page on the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser Website. https://www.graaffreinetadvertiser.com/Classifieds


This allows us to continue publishing Legal Notices / Estate Notices / Lost Deeds or any adverts in the same way as before in this publication.

The PDF version of the E- page is available on all our other publications’ websites as well:

www.georgeherald.com | www.knysnaplettherald.com | www.mosselbayadvertiser.com | www.oudtshoorncourant.com | www.suidkaapforum.com

This means ensuring continued visibility and reach. Feel free to go and check it out.

So, whether you're selling, hiring, or announcing, don’t just hope to be seen—be sought after! Place a classified ad with us today and let your audience come to you.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
